title: Jamaican Swede Hash
description: A Caribbean-inspired twist on traditional swede hash, featuring a spicy kick.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until charred, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the diced swede and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the Jamaican allspice, intensely spicy pepper (if using), salt, and pepper.
Flatten the mixture slightly with a spatula and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Use the spatula to break up the mixture into small pieces.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the hash is crispy and golden brown.
